response.justification: Candidate brings ~15 years of polyglot full-stack experience with recent Staff-level work at Google touching MCP and agentic tooling, which aligns with the AI-native engineering mindset required. However, the resume centers on TypeScript/Node/DLang rather than the deep Python expertise the role demands, and concrete evidence of high-throughput distributed systems ownership is thin outside the Sociomantic stint. Worth a screening call to validate Python depth, distributed-systems scope, and on-call/operational experience.
strengths: Recent Staff role at Google with hands-on MCP and agentic workflow tooling exposure
Long track record across web, mobile, embedded, and high-traffic ad-tech (Sociomantic millions RPS)
Strong craftsmanship background — TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, teaching/workshops
concerns: Python is not listed in the skills section; role requires strong Python
Limited explicit evidence of distributed-systems architecture ownership or on-call/incident leadership at scale
Resume has inconsistencies (overlapping Amazon 'Founder' role with other full-time positions) that need clarification
